UndoEditAction - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Represents a Swing Action intended to trigger an "undo" operation for the last edit performed in a viewer, presumably a table viewer like one managed by PageViewerPanel or XlsmTableViewerFX.
UndoEditAction() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.UndoEditAction
Creates a new UndoEditAction with its own UndoManager.
UndoEditAction(UndoManager) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.UndoEditAction
Creates a new action using the provided UndoManager.

updateBalance(Ledger) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Fund
Updates (recalculates) the balance of this fund by summing the balances (obtained via Account.totalAccountBalance(Ledger)) of all accounts currently associated with this fund.
updateCompanyOpenState(boolean) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.MainApplicationView
Enables or disables primary tabs based on whether a company is open and shows or hides the company selection tab accordingly.

Returns the value of the updatedAt record component.

updateTransaction(AccountingTransaction) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Journal

upsert(String, String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.DocumentRepository
Stores or replaces the JSON payload associated with the supplied document name.
upsert(Account) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.AccountRepository
Inserts or updates an account row and its fund associations.
upsert(DonorContact) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.DonorRepository
Inserts or updates the supplied donor.
upsertTransaction(AccountingTransaction) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.JournalRepository
Inserts or updates a single journal transaction and its entries inside a single database transaction.
